items.name: Hatchet
items.description: A hatchet used by special forces. Capable of delivering fatal blows, but requires regular maintenance to stay sharp.

parts.name: Improved Grip
parts.description: Made of *highly durable* reinforced plastic, the reduced weight improves the overall balance.

parts.name: Fortified Blade
parts.description: Made of nitrogen-strengthened steel. Extremely durable, rust-resistant, and *razor sharp*.

items.name: Hemolytic Injector
items.description: A special drug that destroys infected blood cells. Prevents corpses from mutating and can be used to stealthily take out enemies.

items.name: Empty Bottle
items.description: An empty glass bottle with a faint medicinal smell. It'll smash and draw the attention of those nearby when thrown.

items.name: Bottle of Acid
items.description: A bottle of concentrated sulfuric acid that is highly effective against enemies with exposed tissue.

items.name: Med Injector
items.description: A device used to administer medicine in an emergency. Fully restores your health.

items.name: Green Herb
items.description: A green herb that will restore a small amount of health. Can be combined to enchance their effects.

items.name: Handgun Ammo
items.description: Handgun cartridges suitable for self-loading. Favored for their flat trajectory and moderate recoil. Comes in a pack of 10 bullets.

items.name: Shotgun Shells
items.description: Buckshot ammo for shotgun. Each shell has a wide burst, packing a powerful punch. Comes in a pack of 3 shells.

items.name: Machine Gun Ammo
items.description: Compact and highly portable machine gun ammo. It's comparatively low recoil results in high accuracy. Great for suppressive fire tactics. Comes in a pack of 20 rounds.

items.name: Rifle Ammo
items.description: High-penetration rifle cartridges. Designed to allow for flat trajectory and accurate shooting. Comes in a pack of 3 bullets.

items.name: Magnum Ammo
items.description: Powerful large-caliber cartridges. The destructive power and impact from the sheer mass of the bullet delivers overwhelming damage. Comes in a pack of 3 rounds.

items.name: Hand Grenade
items.description: A hand grenade that disperses a powerful shockwave when it explodes.

items.name: Stacked Hand Grenade
items.description: A hand grenade with another one attached to the bottom. Double the grenades, double the explosion.

items.name: Gal
items.description: A submachine gun developed in the 1950s. Lacks accuracy, but has a large ammo capacity, suitable for bursts of sustained fire.

parts.name: Titanium Bolt
parts.description: This sturdy bolt is built to withstand recoil from rapid-fire shots. Made of titanium but surprisingly light. *Increases power*.

parts.name: Titanium Magazine Catch
parts.description: Designed for smooth operation, it allows for *quick magaine changes*.

parts.name: High-Capacity Mag
parts.description: Higher capacity compared to regular magazines. *More ammo means less reloading*.

items.name: Stiri REVO3 A1
items.description: A lightweight, compact, polymer frame submachine gun. Has a high rate of fire and does considerable damage. Add a stock to improve accuracy.

parts.name: Dot Sight
parts.description: Allows for *quicker aiming* and more *precise shooting*.

parts.name: Folding Stock
parts.description: A lightweight, side-folding stock. *Increases stability*.

parts.name: High-Capacity Mag
parts.description: Higher capacity compared to regular magazines. *More ammo means less reloading*.

parts.name: Long Flash Guard
parts.description: It reduces recoil by venting gas sidewayes, *increasing stability* during rapid fire

items.name: MSBG 500
items.description: A compact, pump-action shotgun. Offers excellent spread, but with limited capacity. Can be customized for an even wider blast.

parts.name: Duralumin Bolt
parts.description: Made of lightweight duralumin alloy where possible. *Increase power and rate of fire*.

parts.name: Balanced Spring
parts.description: This precision spring balances feed and load operations, enabling *silky smooth operation*.

parts.name: Duckbill Choke
parts.description: The protruding plates on the top and bottom allow for *shots to scatter horizontally*.

parts.name: Dualumin Action Bar
parts.description: A lightweight action bar that allows for *quick pump action*.

items.name: W870 Police
items.description: A pump-action shotgun that boasts an impressive spread. Requires a firm grip to keep its high power in check.

parts.name: Silver Tube Extension
parts.description: Extends a regular magainze tube for *increased ammo capacity*.

parts.name: Chrome Stock
parts.description: An extra sturdy, chrome-finished folding stock. *Increases stability*.

parts.name: Chrome Barrel
parts.description: A durable, wear-resistant chrome plating lines the barrel's interior. *Increases power*.

items.name: 990-TAC
items.description: A modern, semi-automatic shotgun. With excellent grouping, it is ideal for precision shooting. A dot sight can be attached.

parts.name: Dot Sight
parts.description: Allows for *quicker aiming* and more *precise shooting*.

parts.name: Stock
parts.description: The shock-absorbing cheek pads provide *extra stability* when firing.

parts.name: Carbon Tube Extension
parts.description: Extends a regular magainze tube for *increased ammo capacity*.

parts.name: Ceramic Coated Barrel
parts.description: Its ceramic coating *increases durability* and keeps everything squeaky clean.

items.name: Alligator Snapper
items.description: A reliable semi-automatic handgun. this custom model is issued to DSO personnel.

parts.name: Dot Sight
parts.description: Allows for *quicker aiming* and more *precise shooting*.

parts.name: Slick Magazine Catch
parts.description: Designed for smooth operation, it allows for *quick magaine changes*.

parts.name: High-Capacity Mag
parts.description: Higher capacity compared to regular magazines. *More ammo means less reloading*.

parts.name: Compensatory
parts.description: *Reduces muzzle rise*. When tilted, the barrel looks like an open mouth with bared fangs.

items.name: Silencer 9
items.description: A powerful and precise handgun. The built-in suppressor effectively dampens the sound of all shots.

parts.name: Dot Sight
parts.description: Allows for *quicker aiming* and more *precise shooting*.

parts.name: Aluminum Trigger
parts.description: Laser-finished, its *lightweight design offers easy handling*.

parts.name: High-Capacity Mag
parts.description: Higher capacity compared to regular magazines. *More ammo means less reloading*.

parts.name: Add-on Suppressor
parts.description: An added sound moderator makes for *near-silent firing*.

items.name: S&S M232
items.description: An incredibly reliable handgun. Grace bought it for self-defense with her first paycheck.

items.name: B934
items.description: A straight blowback handgun. This basic, interwar design prioritizes durability over firepower. This italian pistol was originally a high-class military firearm. An American version was also released and seems to have been the care center's primary self-defense weapon.

items.name: Requiem
items.description: A DSO-issued, large assault revolver that uses 12.7x55mm rounds. Offering high-powered piercing capabilities, it's a weapon you can rely on.

parts.name: Barrel Jacket
parts.description: The sturdy but light upper bridge integrates the front and rear sights into one structure, *improving balance*.

parts.name: Weighted Grip
parts.description: It acts as a counterweight to *mitigate muzzle rise* when firing.

parts.name: Ported Barrel
parts.description: The barrel is fitted with a gas port, expelling gas upwards to *reduce muzzle rise*.

items.name: Classic 70
items.description: A standard bolt-action rifle. Can deliver serious firepower in skilled hands. The scope can be swapped out or removed.

parts.name: Silver Finish Scope
parts.description: This scope boasts a high optical performance, making it ideal for hitting those *long-range* targets.

parts.name: Standard Scope
parts.description: Allows for *target magnification*. A must for *long-range precision shooting*.

parts.name: Premier Stock
parts.description: An elaborate stock made from high quality wood. The perfect weight for *steady firing*.

parts.name: Hair Trigger
parts.description: *The trigger requires little force*, making it easier to fire.

parts.name: Enhanced Leaf Spring
parts.description: The spring aids in chambering cartridges from the magazine for *smoother loading*.

parts.name: PVD Barrel
parts.description: The PVD coating bolsters longevity and *minimizes friction*, guaranteeing pasting performance.

items.name: Marksman 1A
items.description: A semi-automatic marksman rifle. The damage per shot is limited, but it boasts a high rate of fire and fast reload speeds.

parts.name: Semi-auto Scope
parts.description: Suitable for semi-automatic rifles. Designed to withstand the strain of continous firing, *increasing precision*.

parts.name: Reinforced Bolt
parts.description: This hardened bolt is made from impact resistant material. Polished for smooth operation, *increasing the rate of fire*.

parts.name: High-Capacity Mag
parts.description: Higher capacity compared to regular magazines. *More ammo means less reloading*.
